title: Amtech G2250 75mm (3") Bolster Chisel
features: TOUGH: This bolster chisel is made from tough, induction hardened steel and is ideal for general brick work
COMFORTABLE TO USE: The octagonal shaft has a rubber guard and comfortable grip for a positive hold
description: Product Description * Made from induction hardened steel * Octagonal shaft with rubber guard * Manufactured to Amtech's relentless Standards - - There's nothing more satisfying that a job well done, whether that's a major project or a small repair but some of us need a bit of a helping hand in terms of getting the right tool for the job.Amtech have literally thousands of high quality products and you are almost guaranteed to find exactly what your looking for. Safety Warning Yes
